---
title: "Video Appearances"
format: html
editor: visual
---

<details>

<summary><strong>One Big Idea 2: What Pakistan's Top Economists Would Fix</strong></summary>

::: {style="padding: 10px 0 15px 15px; border-left: 3px solid #0055A4; margin-top: 10px;"}
**Hosted by:** *SIA & Haque Economics*

```{=html}
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/EBUr6VYosEk?si=ADs-vWrYlvfBtyQ_&amp;start=2476" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
```
:::

</details>

<details>

<summary><strong>Fuel, Energy and Fertilizer Prices to Rise Further in Pakistan - Shipping Paralysed in Hormuz</strong></summary>

::: {style="padding: 10px 0 15px 15px; border-left: 3px solid #0055A4; margin-top: 10px;"}
**Hosted by:** *PRIME INSTITUTE*

```{=html}
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/QcrC4kBLK44?si=pgCJQAz1Pr4rBR-q" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
```
:::

</details>

<details>

<summary><strong>Can Pakistan Build a Competitive Economy? Role of Research, Collaboration & Trade Policies</strong></summary>

::: {style="padding: 10px 0 15px 15px; border-left: 3px solid #0055A4; margin-top: 10px;"}
**Hosted by:** *SIA & Haque Economics*

```{=html}
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/P6zdMHaKO34?si=astOwRddkMMivRNX" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
```
:::

</details>

<details>

<summary><strong>How to Design the National Tariff Policy</strong></summary>

::: {style="padding: 10px 0 15px 15px; border-left: 3px solid #0055A4; margin-top: 10px;"}
**Hosted by:** *PRIME INSTITUTE*

```{=html}
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/tfV_fT_ctiU?si=dFlyIzEG8Z4zx_z2" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
```
:::

</details>

<details>

<summary><strong>Should India-Pakistan Trade Resume?</strong></summary>

::: {style="padding: 10px 0 15px 15px; border-left: 3px solid #0055A4; margin-top: 10px;"}
**Hosted by:** *InferTalks*

```{=html}
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/-WvRaWCFlEM?si=VVDr76Gdz1Tg_fkg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
```
:::

</details>

<details>

<summary><strong>A talk on 'Pakistan Trade Landscape'</strong></summary>

::: {style="padding: 10px 0 15px 15px; border-left: 3px solid #0055A4; margin-top: 10px;"}
**Hosted by:** *Centre of Business and Economics Research, IBA Karachi*

```{=html}
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/h_m9w7oGRCA?si=ZvODmL4Olw2MI63l" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
```
:::

</details>

<details>

<summary><strong>Export Facilitation Scheme (EFS) - Trade Made Easy Webinar Series</strong></summary>

::: {style="padding: 10px 0 15px 15px; border-left: 3px solid #0055A4; margin-top: 10px;"}
**Hosted by:** *Sustainable Development Policy Institute & Pakistan Single Window*

```{=html}
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/fCoP4QKSYf0?si=x-4xJiUegkbrilyn&amp;start=1421" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
```
:::

</details>

<details>

<summary><strong>Agenda Setting for Climate Change: How can academic research generate policy impact within the energy sector?</strong></summary>

::: {style="padding: 10px 0 15px 15px; border-left: 3px solid #0055A4; margin-top: 10px;"}
**Hosted by:** *Consortium for Development Policy Research & World Bank*

```{=html}
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/QZPRcOPUR1Q?si=rm2Go6JiMd8PhqMZ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
```
:::

</details>

<details>

<summary><strong>Trump's Tariffs - Will tariffs reduce the US trade deficit?</strong></summary>

::: {style="padding: 10px 0 15px 15px; border-left: 3px solid #0055A4; margin-top: 10px;"}
**Hosted by:** *Naya Pakistan, Geo News*

```{=html}
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/zScZc9e4VyM?si=Mo-ZLclreaT6CfeC&amp;start=23" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
```
:::

</details>

<details>

<summary><strong>IRAN–US/ISRAEL WAR FALLOUT ON PAKISTAN’S ECONOMY</strong></summary>

::: {style="padding: 10px 0 15px 15px; border-left: 3px solid #0055A4; margin-top: 10px;"}
**Hosted by:** *Pakistan Economic Frontier*

```{=html}
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/hP4-nNp9T4o?si=gBT-ufiErYxz7ONi&amp;start=1733" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
```
:::

</details>

<details>

<summary><strong>Trump's Trade Shock as A Wake-Up Call for Pakistan</strong></summary>

::: {style="padding: 10px 0 15px 15px; border-left: 3px solid #0055A4; margin-top: 10px;"}
**Hosted by:** *Pakistan Economic Frontier*

```{=html}
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/2RGRPAzvG3A?si=fflB_9cIOAHe9wjn&amp;start=2301" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
```
:::

</details>

<details>

<summary><strong>A Conversation on Pakistan's Trade Competitiveness with Aadil Nakhoda by Learners' Republic</strong></summary>

::: {style="padding: 10px 0 15px 15px; border-left: 3px solid #0055A4; margin-top: 10px;"}
**Hosted by:** *Learners' Republic*

```{=html}
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/PR03PWhuVkg?si=WkLZga4aIVeI72o9" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
```
:::

</details>

<details>

<summary><strong>Building the Economy of Pakistan with Innovative & Competitive Goods w/ Aadil Nakhoda</strong></summary>

::: {style="padding: 10px 0 15px 15px; border-left: 3px solid #0055A4; margin-top: 10px;"}
**Hosted by:** *PRIME Institute*

```{=html}
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/aVtu18u9u2I?si=lh4Rd2HocPGLe1FY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>
```
:::

</details>
